title: WeaponsA
description: it's mod adds advanced Versions of weapons and adds ores, biomes.
body:
It's mod created for those who don't have enough ores or weapons




Biome Nethium: A new unique biome in the Nether (or another dimension), rare resources, and atmospheric landscapes featuring unusual blocks.

1a. Nethium Ore: A rare ore that generates in the Nethium biome. \
1b. Nethium — a powerful material for crafting equipment that surpasses standard counterparts in durability and stats. \
2. Netherite-Iron Sword: A hybrid sword made from netherite and iron — the perfect combination of durability and attack speed, with increased damage and special effects (e.g., fire ignition or enemy slowdown). \
3. New Pickaxes: Pickaxes made from Nethium and other materials — mine ores faster, ignore the hardness of certain blocks, and have improved speed.
New Axes: Powerful axes for chopping trees and close combat, with bonuses to mob damage and increased efficiency. \
4. Improved Weapons: Upgrades for the entire arsenal — increased damage, new effects (poison, regeneration, speed), and compatibility with enchantments.
New Hoe: An improved hoe for farming — accelerates crop growth, fertilizes soil, and provides bonuses to harvesting. \
5. New Armor: A full set of armor made from Nethium — high protection, resistance to fire/poison, bonuses to speed and health regeneration. \
6. New Crafts: Numerous recipes for blocks, tools, weapons, and decor using Nethium and combined materials (e.g., Iron + Netherite).
7. New Music: Atmospheric tracks for the Nethium biome and other locations — epic melodies that enhance immersion.


Photos:![Photo 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0678ade73cd8cd42253fee1c8c72d57cbe776a33.png)   
                      Good luck playing with the mod!!!
